query: What is the business activity of company Cognition (Use the website https://www.cognition.ai/ as your starting point)?Please focus on the positioning on the value chain, the product & services and the end-markets served.Please write paragraph-style starting with [company name] is .... Maintain proper hierarchy of information and keep a neutral tone, sticking to facts and avoiding marketing lingo.Answer in English.
answer:
Cognition is an artificial intelligence company that develops autonomous software engineering agents designed to collaborate with human developers. [Source: Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/) The company operates as a platform provider in the software development value chain, supplying AI-driven coding tools and proprietary models to enterprises, government agencies, and IT service integrators. [Source: Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/), [Introducing Cognition for Government | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/cognition-for-government), [Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the AI Value Journey for Global Enterprises](https://www.infosys.com/newsroom/press-releases/2026/collaboration-accelerate-ai-value-journey.html) By automating repetitive engineering tasks, Cognition aims to allow human engineers to focus on higher-level strategy and system design. [Source: Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/) As of May 2026, the company reached an annualized run-rate revenue of $492 million and raised $1 billion at a $26 billion valuation, supported by a global presence with offices in Singapore, London, and Japan. [Devin Maker Cognition Raises $1B at $26B Valuation - techcoffeehouse.com](https://techcoffeehouse.com/2026/05/28/devin-maker-cognition-raises-1b-at-26b-valuation/), [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog)

### Products and Services
The company's flagship product is Devin, an autonomous AI software engineer capable of planning, writing, testing, and shipping production code independently within existing codebases. [Source: Cognition AI](https://cognition.ai/) Devin operates in a sandboxed workspace featuring a shell, code editor, browser, and persistent file system. [Source: Cognition Labs - Summit Ventures Partners](https://www.summit-ventures.net/company/cognition-ai/) Recent iterations, such as Devin 2.2, enable the agent to utilize a full Linux desktop to launch and test desktop applications, as well as spin up Android Virtual Devices (AVD) for mobile development. [Introducing Devin 2.2 | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/introducing-devin-2-2), [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog) 

In July 2025, Cognition acquired Windsurf, an AI-native integrated development environment (IDE), which led to the launch of Devin Desktop. [Report: Cognition Business Breakdown & Founding Story | Contrary Research](https://research.contrary.com/company/cognition), [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog) This environment features a dashboard for managing multiple local and cloud agents, utilizing "Spaces" to group agents by project and share context across sessions and tasks. [Cognition launches Devin Desktop for managing AI coding agents across engineering workflows - Tech Edition](https://www.techedt.com/cognition-launches-devin-desktop-for-managing-ai-coding-agents-across-engineering-workflows) Additional capabilities include Auto-Triage for bug resolution, Devin Review for pull request analysis, MultiDevin for parallel agent orchestration, and DeepWiki for automated documentation generation. [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog), [Source: Cognition Labs - Summit Ventures Partners](https://www.summit-ventures.net/company/cognition-ai/) To power these tools, Cognition develops specialized, frontier-size models such as the SWE-1.5 and SWE-1.6 series, which feature hundreds of billions of parameters and process up to 950 tokens per second. [Introducing SWE-1.5: Our Fast Agent Model | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/swe-1-5), [An Early Preview of SWE-1.6 and Research Update | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/swe-1-6-preview)

### Value Chain Positioning
On the upstream side of the value chain, Cognition relies on specialized hardware and cloud infrastructure. The company trained its SWE-1.5 model using thousands of NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 chips and partnered with Cerebras to serve models using CS3 inference hardware. [Introducing SWE-1.5: Our Fast Agent Model | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/swe-1-5) For cloud hosting, Cognition utilizes Microsoft Azure for enterprise deployments and AWS GovCloud for government clients. [Cognition developed an AI engineer that transforms enterprise software with Microsoft Azure | Microsoft Customer Stories](https://www.microsoft.com/en-customers/story/24262-cognition-ai-azure), [Introducing Cognition for Government | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/cognition-for-government) While Cognition builds its own models, it also utilizes foundational models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind, maintaining a platform architecture designed to avoid vendor lock-in. [AI Companies Are Rapidly Expanding Into Each Other's Markets - Business Insider](https://www.businessinsider.com/everyone-is-building-everything-openai-anthropic-lovable-cursor-canva-2026-6), [Introducing Cognition for Government | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/cognition-for-government) 

Downstream, Cognition integrates its agents directly into third-party developer ecosystems, including GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Snowflake, and Jira, via secure APIs. [Report: Cognition Business Breakdown & Founding Story | Contrary Research](https://research.contrary.com/company/cognition), [How Cognition Uses Devin to Build Devin | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/how-cognition-uses-devin-to-build-devin) Furthermore, Cognition has established strategic downstream partnerships with major IT service providers like Infosys and Cognizant. [Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the AI Value Journey for Global Enterprises](https://www.infosys.com/newsroom/press-releases/2026/collaboration-accelerate-ai-value-journey.html), [Cognizant and Cognition Partner to Scale Autonomous Software Engineering and Deliver Business Value Across Enterprise Operations - Jan 28, 2026](https://news.cognizant.com/2026-01-28-Cognizant-and-Cognition-Partner-to-Scale-Autonomous-Software-Engineering-and-Deliver-Business-Value-Across-Enterprise-Operations) These firms act as integrators and managed service providers (MSPs), embedding Devin into their proprietary platforms (such as Infosys Topaz Fabric and Cognizant Flowsource) to deliver software engineering as a service to end clients. [Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the AI Value Journey for Global Enterprises](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/infosys-and-cognition-announce-strategic-collaboration-to-accelerate-the-ai-value-journey-for-global-enterprises-302655091.html), [Cognizant and Cognition Partner to Scale Autonomous Software Engineering and Deliver Business Value Across Enterprise Operations - Jan 28, 2026](https://news.cognizant.com/2026-01-28-Cognizant-and-Cognition-Partner-to-Scale-Autonomous-Software-Engineering-and-Deliver-Business-Value-Across-Enterprise-Operations) Gartner Research identifies this dynamic as "AI-shoring," a trend where AI tools disrupt traditional labor arbitrage outsourcing models. [First Take: Cognizant-Cognition Partnership Demonstrates How “AI-Shoring” Disrupts Outsourcing](https://www.gartner.com/en/documents/7383130)

### End-Markets and Use Cases
Cognition primarily serves large-scale enterprises, financial institutions, and government agencies. [Source: Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/), [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog) Direct enterprise customers include Mercedes-Benz, Goldman Sachs, and Itaú. [Source: Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/) Through its IT service partners, Cognition heavily targets the financial services sector, addressing use cases in banking, payments, insurance, and wealth management. [Cognition | Infosys partners with Cognition to expand engineering capacity and help scale its enterprise business](https://cognition.ai/blog/infosys-cognition) 

A major application in these markets is legacy modernization, such as migrating .NET Framework to .NET Core and modernizing millions of lines of COBOL code for Fortune 500 companies. [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog), [Devin's 2025 Performance Review: Learnings From 18 Months of Agents At Work | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/devin-annual-performance-review-2025) The company also serves the public sector through "Cognition for Government," offering DoD IL4/5/6 accredited and SOC 2 Type II certified agents for critical infrastructure modernization. [Introducing Cognition for Government | Cognition](https://cognition.ai/blog/cognition-for-government)

### Business Model
Cognition monetizes its platform through self-serve subscription plans (Free, Pro, Max, Teams, and Enterprise) and a usage-based billing model that measures compute resources in "Agent Compute Units" (ACU). [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog), [Devin 2.0 is here: Cognition slashes price of AI software engineer to $20 per month from $500 | VentureBeat](https://venturebeat.com/programming-development/devin-2-0-is-here-cognition-slashes-price-of-ai-software-engineer-to-20-per-month-from-500) The enterprise version includes specialized features such as VPC deployment, audit logs, centralized admin controls, and machine snapshots. [Devin 2.0 is here: Cognition slashes price of AI software engineer to $20 per month from $500 | VentureBeat](https://venturebeat.com/programming-development/devin-2-0-is-here-cognition-slashes-price-of-ai-software-engineer-to-20-per-month-from-500) To drive enterprise adoption, the company offers an "AI Productivity Guarantee," funding up to $10 million in usage if Devin fails to deliver commensurate engineering value to the customer. [Source: Blog | Cognition](https://www.cognition.ai/blog)

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Financial Breakdown:** The findings provide a top-line annualized run-rate revenue ($492 million) but do not break down revenue by product line, customer segment, or geographic region.
*   **Model Dependency Ratios:** While the findings state Cognition uses models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind alongside its proprietary SWE models, the exact distribution or dependency ratio on these third-party foundational models is not detailed.
*   **Customer Acquisition Cost / Churn:** No data is provided regarding the cost of acquiring enterprise customers or the retention/churn rates of users on their self-serve plans.
